titleStmt.title: SII 24.516: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 516. (A.R. No. 99 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA WALL OF THE WEST VERANDAH.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase by Peddaṇa-Nāyaka Kastūriraṅgappa-Nāyakkaṉ of Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi for offerings to god on the Chittirā Paurṇamī day during his halt at the maṇḍapa on the bank of Kāvērī from morning till the evening. The gift and its administration was entrusted to Kēśavayyaṅgār of Parivaikkarai-Agrahāram in Tañjāvūr-uśāvaḍi. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1519, Hēviḷambi, Mēsha, ba. 5, Mūlā, Monday correspond to 1597 A.D., April 25, Monday, f.d.t. ·37, ·31.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svasti śrīman mahārājādhirāja (rāja) rājaparameśvara śrīvirapradāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapati devamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakā
sdam 1000 5 100 10 9 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa hieviḷampi samvatsarattu meṣa- nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pamcamiyum somavāramum peṟṟa mūla
nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅka tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭā
[rattu] kku tiruccirāppaḷḷi pettaṇa nāyakkar kastūriraṅkappa nāyakkaṉeṉ teṇḍan samarpittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Aṭi
yeṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyamāka teṉ tirukkāverikkarai toppu maṇṭapattil cittirā paurṇamaikku kālame Eḻuntaṟuḷi poḻutu pūrandaṉiyumRead, ‘poḻutu poruntaṉiyum’Eṟiyaruḷukayi
l tirukkuttumaṇiviḷakkukku ney viṭa tiruvantikkāppukku neyvaruṣam Āka ney 2§ varuṣam kku pu2 Amutu ceytaruḷum pori Amutu 2 100kku poṉ § Atiraca
m 3 100- kku poṉ 7pu§ vaṭai 3pukku poṉ 3pu6 cukiyaṉ 3 100kku poṉ 4 pāṉakakūṉ 100kku poṉ10 tetiteṉ kū5kku poṉ 3 pu5 puḷi Okaram kū5kku pon_
5- veḷḷic campāram tiruvolakkattil viṉiyokattukku cantaṇappaṭi 3 10- kku poṉ 1 Aṭaikkāyamutu [100 4 10]kkum Ilai Amutu 5 100kkum pu§ Āka ma
ṇṭapakkaṭṭaḷaikkku 4 tirukkoṭieṟṟakkaṭṭaḷaikku rāttiri tiruppaḷḷiaṟaiyil Amutu ceytaruḷum poṅkal kūṉ 2 kku poṉ 1 pu6 Āka koṭi Eṟṟa
ttiruṉā[ ḷukku] poṉ 5 10 Intappoṉ Aṉpatukkum tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamākac cetta coḻamaṇṭalaccīrmai tañcāvūr Ucāvaṭi parivaikkarai
agrahārattil kecavayyaṅkār kaiyyil koṇṭu cetta pākam 2- kku (kku) rūpāy 1(1/4) rekai poṉ 5 10 Intappoṉ Aṉpatukkum Intappo
liyūṭṭu Inta nilattil Utaiyam koṇṭu cantrātitya varaiyum naṭakka kaṭava tākavum Ituvum Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Ubhayamāka kaṟiyamutu tiruppaṭi
ttarma(m) payiṟ ceyya teṉ tirukkaṟaiyil śrībhaṇṭārattil te tāṉ tiruttoppu Aḷamākaṇai civita cilavukkum Inta Ūril pākam
2(1/2)3 kku rūpāy 1(1/4)m cettu śrībhāgavatan vāy nārāyaṇapaṭṭat tirumalaiyaṅkār kecavayaṅkār vacamākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle Avare
Inta nilam Aṉubhavittukkoṇṭu Inta nilattil Utaiyam koṇṭu toppu Āḷ mākaṇai cilavu paṇṇikkoṇṭu kaṟiyamutu tirup
paṭittaram(m) Inta pākattile mutaliṭṭu maṇṭapam kaṭṭaḷai viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭum tiruppaḷḷiaṟai poṅkal kū vi
ṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu tamakku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle Atuvum Eṭuttuk koṇṭu Ācantrārkkasthāyi Āka putrapautra paramparai Āka tāme Aṉubhavittu
kkoṇṭu Inta dharmmam naṭakkavum [dāna*]pālanayormmaddhyedānātśreyonu pālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam . svadattādviguṇam puṇyam
paradattānupālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattanniṣphalam bhavet . § Intappaṭikku poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇa
kku śrīraṅganārāyaṇa priyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.516 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
